words.definition_vi: đạt được kết quả tốt, thành công trong việc gì đó
words.definition_en: achieving desired aim or result; accomplishing goals
words.example_sentence: The company's successful expansion into new markets attracted many investors and boosted its reputation significantly.

words.definition_vi: liên tiếp, nối tiếp nhau (chỉ chuỗi sự kiện/người)
words.definition_en: following one after another in order; consecutive
words.example_sentence: The team won three successive championships, demonstrating their dominance in the sport over consecutive years.

words.definition_vi: sự nối tiếp, chuỗi liên tục; sự kế vị
words.definition_en: a number of things following one after another; the process of following in order
words.example_sentence: In rapid succession, the government announced three major policy reforms that surprised the public and media.

words.definition_vi: đáng kể, lớn, nhiều (về mức độ/số lượng)
words.definition_en: large in amount, extent, or importance; substantial
words.example_sentence: The research required considerable time and resources, but the findings proved invaluable for medical advancement.

words.definition_vi: chu đáo, tế nhị, suy tính đến cảm xúc người khác
words.definition_en: showing care and attention to the needs and feelings of others
words.example_sentence: Her considerate approach to team management made employees feel valued and motivated to perform better.

words.definition_vi: sự cân nhắc, xem xét; sự chu đáo; yếu tố cần xem xét
words.definition_en: careful thought about something; a factor to be taken into account
words.example_sentence: Environmental protection is an important consideration in modern urban planning and development projects.

words.definition_vi: tương ứng, riêng từng cái (dùng khi nói về nhiều người/vật)
words.definition_en: belonging separately to each of two or more people or things mentioned
words.example_sentence: The three countries signed an agreement to strengthen their respective economies and promote regional cooperation.

words.definition_vi: tôn trọng, lễ phép, có thái độ kính trọng
words.definition_en: showing admiration and deference; polite and courteous
words.example_sentence: A respectful dialogue between generations helped bridge the cultural gap and foster mutual understanding.

words.definition_vi: sự tôn trọng, kính trọng; tôn trọng, kính trọng (động từ)
words.definition_en: admiration for someone or something; to regard with admiration
words.example_sentence: Students should respect their teachers' expertise and dedication to providing quality education and guidance.

words.definition_vi: liên quan đến kinh tế, tiết kiệm
words.definition_en: relating to the production and consumption of goods and services; cost-effective
words.example_sentence: The government implemented economic reforms to reduce inflation and stimulate growth in the manufacturing sector.

words.definition_vi: tiết kiệm, không lãng phí (chỉ cách sử dụng tài nguyên)
words.definition_en: using money, time, or resources carefully and not wastefully
words.example_sentence: Switching to LED bulbs is an economical choice that reduces electricity consumption and lowers monthly bills.

words.definition_vi: có ý nghĩa lịch sử, đáng nhớ trong lịch sử
words.definition_en: famous or important in history; momentous
words.example_sentence: The historic agreement between the two nations marked a turning point in international relations and peace efforts.

words.definition_vi: liên quan đến lịch sử, thuộc về lịch sử
words.definition_en: relating to history or based on history; concerning past events
words.example_sentence: Historical records show that the city was founded in the 15th century and served as a major trade center.

words.definition_vi: thực tế, có thể áp dụng được, hữu ích trong thực hành
words.definition_en: concerned with actual use or practice rather than theory; useful and realistic
words.example_sentence: The training program provides practical skills that students can immediately apply in their future careers.

words.definition_vi: có thể thực hiện được, khả thi (về kế hoạch/phương pháp)
words.definition_en: able to be done or put into practice; feasible
words.example_sentence: The engineer proposed a practicable solution that could be implemented within the existing budget constraints.

words.definition_vi: hợp lý, sáng suốt, có lý trí (chỉ quyết định/người)
words.definition_en: reasonable and practical; showing good judgment
words.example_sentence: It is sensible to invest in renewable energy sources given the long-term environmental and economic benefits.

words.definition_vi: nhạy cảm, dễ bị ảnh hưởng, tinh tế (chỉ cảm xúc/vấn đề)
words.definition_en: easily affected or hurt; responsive to external stimuli; dealing with delicate matters
words.example_sentence: The documentary addressed sensitive issues related to mental health with respect and psychological awareness.

words.definition_vi: có thể so sánh được, tương đương, ngang bằng
words.definition_en: able to be compared; of similar quality or size
words.example_sentence: The two universities have comparable academic standards and offer similar opportunities for student development.

words.definition_vi: so sánh, tương đối (dùng khi so sánh hai thứ)
words.definition_en: relating to or involving comparison; relative rather than absolute
words.example_sentence: A comparative study of educational systems across countries revealed significant differences in teaching methodologies.

words.definition_vi: toàn diện, bao quát, chi tiết đầy đủ
words.definition_en: complete and including all or nearly all elements or aspects
words.example_sentence: The comprehensive report examined all aspects of climate change, from causes to potential solutions and impacts.

words.definition_vi: dễ hiểu, có thể hiểu được
words.definition_en: able to be understood; intelligible
words.example_sentence: The teacher explained complex scientific concepts in a comprehensible manner using everyday examples and visual aids.

words.definition_vi: rõ ràng, khác biệt, riêng biệt (có thể phân biệt rõ)
words.definition_en: recognizably different in nature; clearly defined or marked
words.example_sentence: The research identified two distinct groups of consumers with different preferences and purchasing behaviors.

words.definition_vi: đặc trưng, nổi bật, có tính chất riêng biệt
words.definition_en: having a quality that makes something different and easily noticed
words.example_sentence: The brand's distinctive logo and packaging design helped it stand out in a crowded marketplace.

questions.question_text: After three _______ years of economic growth, the country faced unexpected challenges that threatened its stability.
questions.explanation: Cần tính từ để mô tả 'years' (những năm). 'Successive' = liên tiếp, nối tiếp nhau (ba năm liên tiếp). 'Successful' = thành công (không phù hợp về nghĩa ở đây, vì nó chỉ kết quả, không chỉ sự nối tiếp).

questions.question_text: The company's _______ in expanding to new markets demonstrated strong leadership and strategic planning.
questions.explanation: 'Successful' (tính từ) mô tả sự mở rộng đạt được kết quả tốt. 'Successive' = liên tiếp (sai nghĩa). 'Success' là danh từ (cần tính từ). 'Succession' = sự kế vị (sai nghĩa).

questions.question_text: The _______ amount of data collected required advanced analytical tools to process and interpret accurately.
questions.explanation: 'Considerable' (tính từ) = đáng kể, lớn (mô tả 'amount'). 'Considerate' = chu đáo, tế nhị (sai nghĩa). 'Consideration' = sự cân nhắc (danh từ, sai). 'Considered' = được cân nhắc (sai ngữ cảnh).

questions.question_text: Her _______ behavior toward colleagues created a positive work environment and improved team morale.
questions.explanation: 'Considerate' (tính từ) = chu đáo, tế nhị (mô tả hành vi). 'Considerable' = đáng kể (sai nghĩa). 'Consideration' = sự cân nhắc (danh từ). 'Considering' = xem xét (sai dạng).

questions.question_text: The _______ governments agreed to strengthen bilateral trade and cultural exchanges in their regions.
questions.explanation: 'Respective' (tính từ) = tương ứng, riêng từng cái (khi nói về nhiều chính phủ). 'Respectful' = tôn trọng (sai nghĩa). 'Respectable' = đáng kính (sai). 'Respected' = được tôn trọng (sai).

questions.question_text: The _______ tone of the negotiation helped both parties reach a mutually beneficial agreement.
questions.explanation: 'Respectful' (tính từ) = tôn trọng, lễ phép (mô tả 'tone'). 'Respective' = tương ứng (sai nghĩa). 'Respectable' = đáng kính (sai). 'Respecting' = tôn trọng (sai dạng).

questions.question_text: The government introduced _______ policies to reduce energy consumption and promote sustainable development.
questions.explanation: 'Economical' (tính từ) = tiết kiệm, không lãng phí (mô tả chính sách). 'Economic' = liên quan đến kinh tế (sai, không chỉ tiết kiệm). 'Economics' = kinh tế học (danh từ). 'Economically' = một cách tiết kiệm (trạng từ, sai).

questions.question_text: The _______ significance of the treaty was recognized by historians as a turning point in international relations.
questions.explanation: 'Historic' (tính từ) = có ý nghĩa lịch sử, đáng nhớ (mô tả 'significance'). 'Historical' = liên quan đến lịch sử (sai, chỉ thuộc về lịch sử chứ không chỉ tầm quan trọng). 'Historically' = về mặt lịch sử (trạng từ). 'Historicity' = tính lịch sử (danh từ).

questions.question_text: The _______ approach to problem-solving emphasized real-world applications rather than theoretical concepts.
questions.explanation: 'Practical' (tính từ) = thực tế, hữu ích trong thực hành (mô tả 'approach'). 'Practicable' = có thể thực hiện được (sai, chỉ khả thi chứ không chỉ thực tế). 'Practice' = thực hành (danh từ). 'Practically' = hầu như (trạng từ).

questions.question_text: The engineer proposed a _______ solution that could be implemented within the existing budget and timeline.
questions.explanation: 'Practicable' (tính từ) = có thể thực hiện được, khả thi (mô tả 'solution'). 'Practical' = thực tế (sai, không chỉ khả thi). 'Practiced' = có kinh nghiệm (sai). 'Practicing' = đang thực hành (sai).

questions.question_text: It is _______ to invest in education as it provides long-term benefits for both individuals and society.
questions.explanation: 'Sensible' (tính từ) = hợp lý, sáng suốt (mô tả quyết định đầu tư). 'Sensitive' = nhạy cảm (sai). 'Senseless' = vô lý (sai, trái nghĩa). 'Sensing' = cảm nhận (sai dạng).

questions.question_text: The documentary addressed _______ topics such as mental health and social inequality with care and respect.
questions.explanation: 'Sensitive' (tính từ) = nhạy cảm, tinh tế (mô tả các chủ đề cần xử lý cẩn thận). 'Sensible' = hợp lý (sai). 'Sensory' = liên quan đến giác quan (sai). 'Sensational' = gây chú ý (sai).
